heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 136y Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationAnother enacted sections 154a and 159 and amended sections 151, 154, and 157 of Title 21, Food and Drugs.section 1768 of Pub. L. 99–198

Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subchapter for the period beginning , and ending , $68,604,200 of which not more than $11,993,100 shall be available for research under this subchapter.”Pub. L. 100–532October 1, 1985September 30, 19861985— substituted provisions authorizing appropriations of $68,604,200 for fiscal year 1986 of which not more than $11,993,100 shall be available for research for former provisions which had authorized appropriations for fiscal years 1973 through 1984.Pub. L. 99–1981983— authorized necessary appropriations for period beginning , and ending , not in excess of $64,200,000.Pub. L. 98–201Oct. 1, 1983Sept. 30, 19841980— inserted provisions authorizing appropriations for period beginning , and ending , and for period beginning , and ending .Pub. L. 96–539Oct. 1, 1979Sept. 30, 1980Oct. 1, 1980Sept. 30, 19811978—, substituted appropriations authorization of $46,636,000 for period beginning , and ending , for prior authorization of $23,600,000 for period beginning , and ending , and authorized appropriations of $54,500,000 for period beginning , and ending , and such sums as may be necessary, limited to $70,000,000, for period beginning , and ending .Pub. L. 95–396, § 25Oct. 1, 1976Sept. 30, 1977Oct. 1, 1976Mar. 31, 1977Oct. 1, 1977Sept. 30, 1978Oct. 1, 1978Sept. 30, 19791975— authorized appropriation of $47,868,000 to carry out provisions of this subchapter for period beginning , and ending , and $23,600,000 for period beginning , and ending .Pub. L. 94–140Oct. 1, 1975Sept. 30, 1976Oct. 1, 1976Mar. 31, 1977inserted provisions authorizing appropriation of $5,983,500 for period beginning and ending .Pub. L. 94–109Oct. 1, 1975Nov. 15, 1975authorized appropriation of $11,967,000 to carry out provisions of this subchapter for period beginning , and ending .Pub. L. 94–51July 1, 1975Sept. 30, 1975
Effective Date of 1988 Amendment, , , provided that amendment made by is effective .Pub. L. 100–532, title VII, § 701102 Stat. 2679Pub. L. 100–532Oct. 25, 1988Oct. 1, 1988
